title: Core Elements of Human Antibiotic Stewardship Programs in Resource-Limited Settings | Antibiotic Prescribing and Use | CDC
text:
ments of Human Antibiotic Stewardship Programs in Resource-Limited settings provide national and facility-level activities for antibiotic stewardship program implementation in global resource-limited settings. 
The document includes both national- and facility-level activities to improve antibiotic use and fight antimicrobial resistance based on the resources available. 
The document is available in English and Spanish. 
Overview 
This document builds off of the Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship resources, created for U.S. healthcare settings. It provides a framework for implementing antibiotic stewardship programs in global settings with limited resources. 
Core Elements documents 
The Core Elements of Human Antibiotic Stewardship Programs in Resource-Limited Settings: National and Hospital Levels 
CDC's framework for resource-limited antibiotic stewardship programs for national and hospital levels..
